Prefixes (first 4 digits):
1770 -- whisper of time and gacha items but server sided
1779 -- whisper of time and gacha items but server sided
2050 -- currency items like git, and sidestory currency like black pearls
2110 -- badges and a bunch of other weapons
2170 -- badges and a bunch of other weapons
2180 -- Timetwisted Maze Charms
2310 -- random ahh Ultra Salmon, neo meat, Super Crunch
2320 -- Item names: Rolly-rolly (Index 1 at address 79835EC120 Value: 0), Catnip (Index 2 at address 7983DE9760 Value: 0), Squeaky EX (Index 3 at address 7983DEC6A0 Value: 0)
2350 -- random opus ticket, treatisies ticket, or codexes ticket (i think unavilable in current state of the game)
2419 -- DANGER key items like story keys and also some items and misc keystuff all which are DANGEROUS
2430 -- will corrupt world if have more than 1 or any modifications to any item here (restore mp and hp item food)
2470 -- MISC stuff like Grasta upgrade Ore, Gadaro Soil, Poison Res.+20 Seed, Darkness Res. Fertilizer, Funeral Cavern Soil, Sleep Res. Fertilizer, Stone Res. Fertilizer, Poison Res. Fertilizer, Confusion Res. Fertilizer, Talgana Mountain Soil, Last Stand Ore

2819 -- Another prefix for badges
